name: Age-related frailty plasmapheresis registry
summary: Unknown-status early phase 1 registry testing repeated plasmapheresis for age-related frailty with Canadian Study of Health and Aging Clinical Frailty Scale outcome.

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated primary completion was April 2025 and study completion was May 2025; no posted results were present in the June 9, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is frailty trial-status context, not efficacy evidence.
trial_details.why_it_matters: A frailty outcome would be more aging-relevant than biomarker-only TPE evidence if controlled and reported.
